# Book in seconds.   Drive in minutes.

Wheels when you want them® with gas included. Get your first month on us\* with code: MONTHOFF.

[Join now](https://www.zipcar.com/pricing)

![animation of city landscape with people and cars](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/files/hero_img/metropolis-hero.png)![animation of city landscape with people and cars](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/files/hero_img/metropolis-hero_0.png)

## The most convenient way to have a car

###### Cars near you

In your neighborhood, book by the hour or day.

###### Save money

Save over [$1,000/month](https://www.zipcar.com/ziptopia/city-living/zipcar-members-save-more) vs. owning a car. Gas, maintenance, designated parking and insurance options included.

###### Self-service

Book a car and unlock all from your phone. No waiting or weird vibes.

![Stacked images of a man pumping gas leaning on his car and a person holding a coffee and looking at the Zipcar app on their phone.](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/column-section/1230%20x%20925%20Benefits.png)

## What’s included

![Gas & Charging](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/column-section/gas-ev_0.svg)

###### Gas & EV charging

Pay $0 at the pump or charging station.

![Insurance](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/column-section/insurance_0.svg)

###### Insurance

Drive worry-free with [standard damage protection](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220433387-What-is-the-basic-insurance-coverage-Zipcar-provides).

![Maintenance](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/column-section/maintenance_0.svg)

###### Maintenance

Our pros handle all repairs and upkeep.

![24/7 Support](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/column-section/support_0.svg)

###### 24/7 Support

Help or roadside assistance is always a call or live chat away.

[View plans and pricing](https://www.zipcar.com/pricing)

### How Zipcar works

### Cars around campus

Get off campus and save with your student discount.

[Find my school](https://www.zipcar.com/universities)

![Student driving a Zipcar ](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/files/2024-11/university-driving.svg)

### Cars for business

Simplify your transportation with low weekday rates and experts on your side.

[Get started](https://www.zipcar.com/business)

![Zipcar for Business member driving a Zipcar ](https://media2.zipcar.com/drupal-presales/files/2024-11/business-new.svg)

### How do I join Zipcar?

[Apply online](https://www.zipcar.com/pricing) with a valid driver's license and download our personal [car rental app](https://www.zipcar.com/mobile). Most people are approved instantly and rent a car within minutes. [Learn more](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220676147-How-to-Join).

### How much does Zipcar cost?

Zipcar memberships start at $9 a month or $90 a year. Reserve cars by the hour or by the day. Gas, insurance options, and 200 miles per day are all included in membership. Other fees, such as a [young driver fee](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220675907-Zipcar-Fees-Fines), may apply. [Price it out](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220675907-Zipcar-Fees-Fines).

### How soon can I drive with Zipcar?

First, [sign up](https://www.zipcar.com/pricing) for membership. Most members are approved instantly and can book their first daily or hourly car rental within minutes but in some cases, it may take a little longer to check your driving record. As soon as you're approved, you can book a Zipcar near you and use our [car rental app](https://www.zipcar.com/mobile) to unlock and lock during your trip.

### Are there Zipcars near me?

Zipcars live in hundreds of cities and towns globally. Type your address in the [search bar](https://www.zipcar.com/#) below to [find Zipcars near you](https://www.zipcar.com/cities).

[More questions?](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us)

When booking a reservation, you can choose a car type to fit your needs or your mood—from compact sedans to larger cars such as cargo vans and SUVs, and even luxury car rentals, we’ve got you covered.

### How many miles are included?

No matter where or how long you drive, 200 miles are included per day with most membership plans. Any overage is billed at $.67 per mile. [Learn more](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220623207-Miles-Included).

### Is gas included?

Yes, gas is included in the cost of your Zipcar membership. You can find the free gas card in the visor over the driver's seat of every Zipcar. To use, insert the card at gas station as you would a credit card. Remember to always return cars with at least ¼ tank of gas to avoid fees. [Learn more about how to fuel up here](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220273868-I-Need-Help-Fueling-Up).

### How does Zipcar insurance coverage work?

All members in good standing have secondary third party auto liability and, where required, Personal Injury Protection (PIP) or “no fault” coverage. A $2,500 damage fee may apply which you can reduce or eliminate by buying an optional damage protection waiver. [More details](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220433387-Insurance-Coverage).

\*Offer valid for new Zipcar members’ first month of membership only and cannot be combined with any other offer. Excludes current Zipcar members. Zipcar may change or revoke the discount any time. Membership Discount excludes Annual, Business and University rate plans, will be applied to Monthly membership rate plan only, and has no cash value.

Starting rates are estimates only and do not reflect variations due to discounts, availability, holidays, or other factors. Actual prices may vary. [Other fees may apply](https://support.zipcar.com/hc/en-us/articles/220675907 "Other fees may apply"). You may review your total estimated reservation cost before you confirm your reservation.

A non-refundable $25 application fee applies when you submit your Zipcar application.
